{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032300590057086C22EF1B693BFDCA"}"},"total":1455},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7305271229123560226","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是看到比较好的了小说，写出了男女主从无到有的感情升华过程，以及和其他宗门之间的纠葛都没有流水账一样，没有为了凑字数而用无聊且苍白和与文章无关的语言对白或者对骂，到目前三百多章还算合我个人的意，"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700892347,"group_id":"7235962143076518915","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"旭旭清城","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+coj+YrhIe/BWUkrBqwuVc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"206360436279175","user_name":"爱吃清流兜汤的"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"206360436279175","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7235962143076518915","book_info":{"abstract":"凡人流+凡人流+凡人流+单女主+无系统+不后宫+不无脑
苏平携带一樽青铜小鼎穿越到仙侠大陆，穿越所携带的天地之威恰好救下了正在被追杀的女宗主。
苏平成为了女宗主的解毒工具，也此成为宗门的外门弟子，踏上修行之路。
仙路多崎岖，凡人亦登天。
青铜小鼎能够淬炼灵液催熟灵药，五灵根的苏平一路崛起。
回首往昔，一切都要从那来路不明的几块灵石开始！
境界：炼气，筑基，金丹，元婴，化神......
本书又名：苟在女大佬身边偷偷修炼；修仙：与女宗主双修，日久生情了；开局高冷女宗主，我选择软饭硬吃","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3a1cab4d9a5cbac6c3e96645455619fe","author":"茶语无声","author_id":"","book_id":"7235962143076518915","book_name":"开局高冷女宗主，我选择软饭硬吃","book_short_name":"炼天仙途","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7235981200202924599","read_count":"19402","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2720807"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"1306","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,单女主,东方玄幻,架空,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/af1d7d75aeaeccac199a65ffd0733c61~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382741&x-signature=QdcQ0qerGL4AfjcpExybJnXOpHw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"765717223834590","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"", 我到了830章了，我怕我看完放慢了速度
我看过最好看小说没有之一
没有无敌只有拼命，把修仙的残酷提现的淋漓尽致
感情方面也单一，这个我也特别喜欢，再多红颜也抵不过唯一真诚的爱
希望作者身体健康，万事如意，心想事成
看小说和动漫是我唯一爱好了
感谢作者给我带来的快乐
也祝看小说的大佬们每天开开心心，充实快乐的过自己的美好一天

并且人物设定过于古板，缺乏生动形象感。但依旧是一篇不错的小说，在🍅可以说是排的上号的
可男女主情感戏非常精彩[吃瓜]虽然不是顶级的，但是非常合我胃口[舔屏]
值得观看[学会了]只要不较真，这就是一本不可多得的好书[雀食神作]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753219549,"group_id":"7235962143076518915","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"故事不在手法，在于想法。慢热是为了铺垫感情，不是丰富剧情","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NySEtLtuN6j5gioWZCN+ozg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/f7fb2655a3454a30bbf15cc34661fb86~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789366&x-signature=fyvb7SZv19eyRwVO0%2BdBGYIxJ6Q%3D","user_id":"53440115183","user_name":"𝓑𝓵𝓲𝓷𝓴"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"53440115183","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7235962143076518915","book_info":{"abstract":"凡人流+凡人流+凡人流+单女主+无系统+不后宫+不无脑
